BBa_K1031907.name: Pars Arsenic Sensing Promoter
BBa_K1031907.function: Promoter responsive to arsenite ions, repressed by ArsR in the absence of arsenic
BBa_K1031907.description: Arsenic-responsive promoter from the ars operon.

BBa_K1031311.name: ArsR Transcription Factor
BBa_K1031311.function: Arsenic-responsive transcriptional repressor. Dissociates from Pars in the presence of arsenite.
BBa_K1031311.description: ArsR repressor from E. coli ars operon. Senses arsenic.

BBa_K346001.name: Pmer Mercury Sensing Promoter
BBa_K346001.function: Mercury-inducible promoter from the mer operon. Activated by MerR in the presence of Hg(II).
BBa_K346001.description: Promoter activated by MerR regulator when mercury ions are present.

BBa_K346002.name: MerR Mercury Sensing Regulator
BBa_K346002.function: Mercury-responsive transcriptional regulator. Activates Pmer upon binding Hg(II).

BBa_J45992.name: PcopA Copper Responsive Promoter
BBa_J45992.function: Copper-inducible promoter activated by CueR regulator.
BBa_J45992.description: Promoter responsive to copper ions via CueR activation.

P15905.name: CueR Copper Sensing Regulator
P15905.function: Copper-responsive transcriptional activator. Activates copA promoter.

BBa_K1060002.name: CcdB Toxin
BBa_K1060002.function: CcdB toxin protein. Inhibits DNA gyrase causing cell death. Used in kill switches.
BBa_K1060002.description: CcdB toxin. Part of the CcdA/CcdB toxin-antitoxin system for kill switches.

BBa_J23100.name: Constitutive Promoter J23100
BBa_J23100.function: Strong constitutive promoter from the Anderson library
BBa_J23100.description: Constitutive promoter, strongest in the Anderson collection

BBa_R0040.name: PLtet Promoter
BBa_R0040.function: Tetracycline-inducible promoter. Repressed by TetR; tetracycline or aTc releases TetR.

BBa_E0040.name: GFP (Green Fluorescent Protein)
BBa_E0040.function: Green fluorescent protein. Emits at 509 nm.
BBa_E0040.description: GFP reporter for gene expression visualization.

BBa_E1010.name: mRFP1 (Red Fluorescent Protein)
BBa_E1010.function: Monomeric red fluorescent protein. Emits at 607 nm.

BBa_C0062.name: LuxR Activator (Quorum Sensing)
BBa_C0062.function: LuxR transcription factor. Binds AHL and activates PLux promoter. Quorum sensing activator.
BBa_C0062.description: LuxR. Quorum sensing TF used in cell-cell communication circuits.

BBa_C0051.name: Lambda cI Repressor
BBa_C0051.function: Lambda phage cI repressor. Represses PR and PL promoters. Key component of repressilators.
BBa_C0051.description: Lambda cI. Used in repressilators and genetic switches.

BBa_R0062.name: PLux Promoter (Quorum Sensing)
BBa_R0062.function: Promoter activated by LuxR-AHL complex. Quorum sensing responsive.
BBa_R0062.description: LuxR/AHL-activated promoter from V. fischeri quorum sensing system.

BBa_K525998.name: Firefly Luciferase Reporter
BBa_K525998.function: Bioluminescent reporter producing light via luciferin oxidation.

BBa_K1060001.name: CcdA Antitoxin
BBa_K1060001.function: CcdA antitoxin protein. Neutralizes CcdB toxin to prevent cell death under normal conditions.
BBa_K1060001.description: CcdA antitoxin. Paired with CcdB for controllable cell death.

BBa_C0040.name: TetR Repressor
BBa_C0040.function: Tet repressor. Binds tet operator and represses PLtet. Released by tetracycline/aTc.
BBa_C0040.description: TetR repressor. Paired with PLtet for tetracycline-inducible systems and toggle switches.
